productDisplayName: Vans Men TNT 5 Grey Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by skate boarders, TNT 5 shoes come in a classic skate board friendly design. Team these with jeans and graphic tees. Upper Suede uppers for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for added comfort and reinforcement Leather overlays on the sides for added style Padded collar, tongue and textile lining for extra comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
